calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Interpleader/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Steven Simontacchi, Esq. for Defendant: IMAT, LLC,
Witness: Dilip Patel, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Plaintiff: Roza Real Estate Loans, Inc.
Exhibit A through D - Deed of Trust and multiple doc. not identify on the record-----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Interpleader: IMAT, LLC, a California limited liability company, for the remaining funds interpleaded with the Court, see scanned doc. for details.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court, and to prepare Judgment.

April 19, 2007
Judgment signed by VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire.

Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Set For Trial On Mar-26-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
